note: Windows Core.csproj retarget to net10.0 is clean (WinUI App still pins net10.0-windows; consumers can ref). Swift + C# harnesses use public APIs, deterministic, exit nonzero on failure. Rust verify asserts marker presence (not tautological). 3 non-blocking follow-ups spun out as H-6-followup: trap EXIT cleanup, explicit SKIPPED prefix, fail-on-repair-log mode.
